description_long: This is a medium-sized, round pumpkin with a deep orange rind and a short, green stem at the top. The front face is intricately carved with a menacing, jagged-toothed mouth, sharp triangular eyes, and a pointed nose, creating a classic Halloween jack-o'-lantern expression. The carving is bold and angular, with deep cutouts that contrast sharply against the smooth, uncarved surface of the rest of the pumpkin. The pumpkin's surface is slightly ribbed, giving it a natural, organic appearance. No additional decorations or accessories are present, and the interior appears hollow, as is typical for carved pumpkins. The back and sides of the pumpkin remain uncarved and smooth, emphasizing the dramatic effect of the front-facing design.
description: A round, orange pumpkin with a green stem and a sharply carved, menacing jack-o'-lantern face on the front. The rest of the pumpkin is smooth and uncarved.
description_view_0: The front view shows the detailed, jagged jack-o'-lantern face with sharp eyes, nose, and mouth carved into the pumpkin.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the smooth, uncarved surface of the pumpkin, with only a hint of the carved face visible at the edge.
description_view_2: The back view displays the fully intact, ribbed orange surface with no carvings or features visible.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the smooth pumpkin surface with a partial glimpse of the carved face at the edge.
attribute_carving_pattern: The carving pattern is a traditional Halloween jack-o'-lantern face with sharp, angular eyes, a pointed nose, and a wide, jagged mouth filled with triangular teeth. The style is bold and expressive, with deep cutouts and no additional motifs or etchings.
